title: Very Important Message - Get Carbonite online backup

transcript.text: This is a special message for my subscribers, people who click on subscribers and they see my videos all up in there. You really should watch this video. It is something that probably not enough people are doing.

What you want to do is you want to get Carbonite. I found out about it today through iPower, my server. It's an external backup for all of your files. Most of us are smart enough to have a backup computer or a backup hard drive, but the problem is that it doesn't matter how cool your hard drive is.
I have a terabyte hard drive. Those things eventually die and you never know when it will die. And if it dies and you lose all your stuff, you know, we've got more and more stuff coming up.
It's more and more stuff we're downloading off the internet to listen to. You want to back it up someplace that's 100% sure.
And for Carbonite, you pay 50 bucks a year and it's unlimited storage. And I think I read on the thing, you can upload like three gigabytes a day of stuff.
And it only, and it only uploads when your computer's not being used. So just keep your computer on and then you, you know, you go to bed or you're walking around and you're not doing anything.
Then it starts to upload the stuff again. So it doesn't get in the way. And, um, it's supposed to be really easy to use.
And, uh, it's backed up on four different sites throughout America. Um, and I mean, woof, would that take a load off? Would that take some stress away from your life?
Always that fear that maybe you're going to lose everything. So, um, do it tomorrow and go get some Carbonite, um, unlimited backup.
And then, uh, and I think it's, it's like really easy to use. Like, like if you ever make a, uh, like an, like an add addition to one of your folders that automatically absolute loads to Carbonite.
So it basically means that you're not going to have to have a backup, uh, external hard drive anymore. So do it, do it now. There you go. How long is that?
